Otrajā daļā tiek analizēti Xiaomi arēnas plāni un izvērtētas tās evakuācijas iespējas. Trešajā daļā aplūkoti citi pētījumi, kas ir vērsti uz līdzīgām tēmām."

Question 1: Chapters. Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? It says "divās galvenajās daļās – teorētiskajā un praktiskajā." Then within the theoretical part, it says "saturs ir sadalīts trīs daļās." It lists the three sub-sections: first, second, third. So yes, it lists main sections: theoretical and practical, and within theoretical, three sub-sections. So compliance: true.

But maybe the question expects listing of main sections of the thesis, not sub-sections. It lists them. So yes.

Question 2: Description. Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It gives brief description: first part explains general evacuation principle, second part analyzes Xiaomi arena plans, third part looks at other studies. So yes, brief description. So compliance: true.

Question 3: Structure. Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? It says two main parts, theoretical and practical. The theoretical part has three subparts. But it doesn't describe practical part. So maybe incomplete. The structure is partially clear but missing details of practical part. So compliance: false.

Let's craft feedback accordingly.
